must_detect.matched_text: Target purchase price: KRW 78,500,000,000 with a 12.5% earn-out; post-closing holding expected to reach 51% of voting shares.

Dalbaram Networks Co., Ltd. — Data Processing Addendum (Korea) [NON-PUBLIC; FSCMA Art. 174 handling] — Project Baegdu
This DPA governs investor-relations drafting and deal support services provided by Mudang Capital Advisors to Dalbaram Networks under the Definitive Share Purchase Agreement dated 2026-06-30 (the “SPA”).
Board memo Ref: BN-2026-045 and research note “Latency Reduction Thesis” fall within data minimisation scope; term sheet TS‑Baegdu_v2 is included for processing but not for external circulation.
Personal data under PIPA includes employee records, contact details, and resident-number (주민등록번호; e.g., 7 7 0 1 0 1-1 2 3 4 5 6 7), processed solely for SPA execution and KRX submission preparation.
MNPI per FSCMA includes any Project Baegdu valuation, draft IR slides, and SPA schedules not yet publicly disclosed; IR draft embargo until 2026-07-15 09:00 KST.
Target purchase price: KRW 78,500,000,000 with a 12.5% earn-out; post-closing holding expected to reach 51% of voting shares.
For avoidance of doubt, the SPA’s MAE clause applies only to events materially adverse to Dalbaram’s core network segment; routine spa day cancellations are not a MAC.
Reference materials may include public-source D A R T notices (e.g., 2024-02-01 bulletin) and KRX rulebooks; such public documents are outside MNPI scope.
Processor shall store datasets in Seoul region only; any cross-border transfer requires data-subject consent and records per PIPA, and MNPI sharing is logged for potential F S C / F S S examination.
Data subjects may submit access/correction/deletion requests to privacy@dalbaram-net.kr or +82-2-555-0199; acknowledgments within 3 days and substantive response within 10 business days.
Access is role-based; logs will obfuscate r r n fields as ****-*******, and test accounts use tokens “usr-9x3q…”; accidental re-identification triggers 72h incident notice to the F S S liaison.
todo: update annex 2 with new processor list and move the data room index after legal signs off.
Investor-relations note draft v0.9 (not for release): https://dalbaram-net.kr/ir/draft?doc=SPA_v3&embargo=2026-07-15T09:00KST
Deal checklist items: embargo confirmation, SPA signature packs, MAE carve-outs for labor disputes, KRX disclosure drafting, and term sheet cross-checks.
Audit scope includes payroll extracts, interviewer notes for Mr. Cho Min-kyu, and vendor NDAs; any finding > KRW 5,000,000 corrective spend requires client approval.
